{{Quote|I engaged the jump drive for a trip in outsystem. It took about two hours. When I got out, it was 200 years later.|Bosbit Matarcher on a hyperspace jump he engaged in 212 BBY that transported him to 22 BBY|<ref name="Matarcher" />}}
'''212 before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] ([[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]])''' was a [[Standard year/Legends|year]] during the [[Republic Classic era|Great Peace of the Republic]] era. Beginning nearly 800 years previously, this [[Time/Legends|time]] period marked widespread exploration into the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the opening of the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]]. In 212 BBY, [[Delemede/Legends|Delemede]]–native [[Bosbit Matarcher]] attempted to make a [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] jump in a recently bought [[Delemedian starhopper]]. However, Matarcher's [[Starship/Legends|starship]] had a faulty [[relativistic shield]]—which guarded against the strange bends in time and [[Realspace/Legends|space]] associated with hyperspace travel—and during the jump, Matarcher was transported [[22 BBY/Legends|190 years]] into the future.

==Proem==
In [[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY]], the [[New Sith Wars]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness]] came to an end. The [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] at the time, [[Tarsus Valorum/Legends|Tarsus Valorum]], reorganized the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Senate]] through the [[Ruusan Reformations/Legends|Ruusan Reformations]],<ref name="atlas">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> and the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] became a branch of the Republic [[Judicial Department/Legends|Judicial Department]].<ref name="nec">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref>

==The galaxy in 212 BBY==
By the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] 212 BBY, the [[Republic Classic era|Great Peace of the Republic]] era—the period of [[Time/Legends|time]] that followed the Ruusan Reformation—was nearly eight hundred years in the making.<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|363|Great Peace of the Republic}}</ref> The Republic continued its expansion into the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]] and previously uncharted [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]] areas that later became part of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="atlas" />

Around 212 BBY, [[Bosbit Matarcher]], a thirty-five standard year old [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] from the then–shoddy [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Delemede/Legends|Delemede]], bought a [[Delemedian starhopper]]. Thinking he had gotten a good deal for the [[Starship/Legends|starship]], Matarcher boarded his starhopper and left Delemede, hoping to make a quick jump outsystem. However, when Matarcher engaged his vessel's [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]], the ship's [[relativistic shield]], which protected the ship from the irregular bends in time and [[Realspace/Legends|space]] associated with [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] travel, malfunctioned.<ref name="Matarcher" />

==Impact==
Following 212 BBY, the Republic continued its expansion, and the Great Peace of the Republic lasted for over 150 years. Meanwhile, when Matarcher emerged from hyperspace, he discovered that much had changed for the [[Galaxy/Legends|galaxy]]. Although Matarcher experienced only a two [[Standard hour/Legends|hour]] journey, for the rest of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], 190 years had passed, putting Matarcher in the year [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="Matarcher" /> the last year of the Great Peace of the Republic era.<ref name="CSWE" />

Matarcher, now a 225 standard year old man, gained brief notoriety for the extremely unusual malfunction that sent him 190 years into the future. Matarcher received a minor interview by the [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]], during which Matarcher stated he would be returning to Delemede, but this time, he would be flying transit. Matarcher also said he was happy the malfunction had occurred; when he had left Delemede in 212 BBY, the planet was in a state in disrepair, but in 22 BBY, Delemede was a thriving.<ref name="Matarcher" />

==Notable events==
*Circa 212 BBY, Bosbit Matarcher unintentionally [[Time travel/Legends|time travels]] 190 years into the future, due to faulty relativistic shielding on his recently bought starship.<ref name="Matarcher" />

==Behind the scenes==
212 BBY was first indirectly mentioned in the [[in-universe]] [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 48|''HoloNet News Vol. 531'' 48]] article, "225-year Old Man's Secret? Time Dilation." In the article, it is stated that Matarcher was thirty–five standard years old, and upon time traveling, was 225 standard years old, signifying that Matarcher traveled 190 years through time. Since the article is set in the year 22 BBY, it can then be assumed that Matarcher's journey began around the year 212 BBY. 212 BBY was again indirectly mentioned in Bosbit Matarcher's entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''.
